headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 18, 2026**
article:
The Washington Nationals took a thrilling 8-7 win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, led by Marcell Ozuna's home run and three RBIs. The San Francisco Giants secured a shutout victory over the Cincinnati Reds, winning 3-0 behind Landen Roupp's 6.0 innings of scoreless baseball. The Los Angeles Angels dominated the New York Yankees, securing an 11-4 victory behind Jo Adell's grand slam and four RBIs.

Injuries and availability are impacting several teams. Zach McKinstry has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to left hip and abdominal inflammation, effective retroactive to April 16, 2026. Josh Hader has been transferred from the 15-day to the 60-day injured list with left biceps tendinitis. Daniel Palencia has been placed on the 15-day injured list with a left oblique strain, while Ken Waldichuk has been transferred from the 15-day to the 60-day injured list with left forearm tightness.

Several trades and roster moves have taken place. The Los Angeles Dodgers traded Axel Perez to the Baltimore Orioles for Chayce McDermott. The New York Mets traded Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash. The Arizona Diamondbacks traded Junior Fernández to the Milwaukee Brewers. The Cincinnati Reds traded Christian Encarnacion-Strand to the Baltimore Orioles for cash.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Thrilling 8-7 Win Over Pirates**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals edged out the Pittsburgh Pirates in a high-scoring matchup, securing an 8-7 victory. Marcell Ozuna led the Nationals' offense with a home run and three RBIs.

top_news.title: **Giants Shut Out Reds 3-0**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants secured a shutout victory over the Cincinnati Reds, winning 3-0. Landen Roupp led the Giants' pitching effort, throwing 6.0 innings with 6 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Royals Fall Short in Thrilling 9-10 Loss to Tigers**
top_news.summary: The Kansas City Royals came up just short, losing 9-10 to the Detroit Tigers in a back-and-forth contest. Salvador Perez led the Royals' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Angels Blast Past Yankees 11-4**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels dominated the New York Yankees, securing an 11-4 victory. Jo Adell led the Angels' offense with a grand slam and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Mets Suffer 8-Run Loss to Cubs**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs dominated the New York Mets, winning 12-4 in a one-sided matchup. Francisco Lindor and Francisco Alvarez led the Mets' offense, while Nico Hoerner and Ian Happ paced the Cubs' attack.

top_news.title: **McKinstry Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Detroit Tigers third baseman Zach McKinstry has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to left hip and abdominal inflammation, effective retroactive to April 16, 2026.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Acquire RHP Chayce McDermott in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers have made a move to bolster their pitching staff, acquiring right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott in a trade with the Baltimore Orioles.
